tags.name: mc-input-group
tags.description:
Attributes:

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `legend` {string} - The legend of the component.
Can be passed as a simple string or as a slot for HTML content.
Required attribute used for accessibility as the fieldset legend.

  * `hiddenlegend` {boolean} - Determines whether the legend is visually hidden.

  * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text.

Properties:

  * `defaultSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `elements` {`HTMLElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `legend` {string} - The legend of the component.
Can be passed as a simple string or as a slot for HTML content.
Required attribute used for accessibility as the fieldset legend.

  * `hiddenlegend` {boolean} - Determines whether the legend is visually hidden.

  * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text.

  * `bodyOverflow` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `bodyPostion` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `windowScrollTop` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`Viewport | undefined`} - 

  * `viewportResizeHandlerInFullScreenModal` - This is to revert modal body being pushed by the keyboard when
modal is displayed upon focusing on an input,
or close the modal when doing window resize while the modal is open.

  * `handleResize` -

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: legend
attributes.description:
`legend` {string} - The legend of the component.
Can be passed as a simple string or as a slot for HTML content.
Required attribute used for accessibility as the fieldset legend.

Property: legend

Default: Legend

attributes.name: hiddenlegend
attributes.description:
`hiddenlegend` {boolean} - Determines whether the legend is visually hidden.

Property: hiddenlegend

Default: false

attributes.name: hint
attributes.description:
`hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text.

Property: hint
